title: Trim Backport Fix
description: fixes new trim textures on older versions
body:
fixes flow, bolt, silence, wayfinder, raiser, shaper and host trim patterns and resin material having a missing texture on older clients (1.21.3/1.20 and below) and changes the sentry and dune textures to the 1.20 ones (for 1.19.4).   

Feedback and support: discord - name:"silvrvr"
